name: OpenStream
description: Ollama companion plugin with diagnostics, prompt guidance, and heuristic recommendations for OpenClaw.

promptGuidance.description: When true, inject stable Ollama/open-source model guidance into system prompt space.

streamingMode.description: Preferred OpenStream streaming preset used by diagnostics and sample config output.

enableMegaContext.description: Whether diagnostics should recommend 2M-context behavior when model families support it.

maxContextWindow.description: Maximum context window OpenStream should recommend in generated config snippets.

doctorDefaultProvider.description: Preferred provider label shown by doctor/sample-config output.
